This PR extracts shared Talk event payload/metric helpers, reuses existing record/number coercion helpers across SDK, agents, gateway, and Talk code, and adds four root AGENTS.md readability rules.

PR surface: Source -48, Docs +4. Total -44 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a refactor and policy-guidance PR, not a bug report. Source review compared the helper semantics and the PR body lists focused post-change validation.

target.title: refactor: share talk event metric extraction
target.body:
## Summary

- Share Talk event payload/metric extraction between logging and diagnostics.
- Reuse existing record/number coercion helpers across SDK, agent, gateway, and Talk code instead of repeating local guards.
- Add terse AGENTS rules for low-churn readability patterns after the refactor and proof passed.

## Verification

- pnpm test src/talk/logging.test.ts src/talk/diagnostics.test.ts packages/sdk/src/index.test.ts src/agents/openclaw-tools.subagents.sessions-spawn-applies-thinking-default.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/agent-wait-dedupe.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/artifacts.test.ts
- node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false
- env -u OPENCLAW_TESTBOX pnpm check:changed
- pnpm build
- git diff --check
- .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Repeated boundary coercion and Talk event metric extraction are consolidated without changing SDK run/session parsing, agent yield/thinking handling, gateway wait/artifact handling, or Talk observability payloads.
Real environment tested: Local macOS checkout on Node/pnpm repo defaults.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: pnpm test src/talk/logging.test.ts src/talk/diagnostics.test.ts packages/sdk/src/index.test.ts src/agents/openclaw-tools.subagents.sessions-spawn-applies-thinking-default.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/agent-wait-dedupe.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/artifacts.test.ts; node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false; env -u OPENCLAW_TESTBOX pnpm check:changed; pnpm build; git diff --check; .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local.
Evidence after fix: Focused tests passed 63 assertions; root tsgo passed; check:changed completed core/core-test typecheck, lint, guards, and import-cycle checks; build-all completed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: The refactor reduces the patch by 44 net LOC while keeping targeted behavior and repository gates green.
What was not tested: Live provider or cross-platform E2E scenarios; this is a local refactor and AGENTS guidance change.
target.author: steipete
